CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID MENDEZ AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 240 O'FARRELL ST, #618, S.F, CA. - $1,708.47 RENT & DAMAGES - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-23-94 - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES - DEF. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION. PL. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JAMES ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 O'FARRELL ST #618, SAN FRANCISCO $1,708.47 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,708.47, LEASE FORFEITED, SEEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
